description_long: This is a rectangular, opaque plastic bottle with a rounded shoulder and a cylindrical, screw-on cap. The front of the bottle features a blue and white NIVEA MEN logo, along with Russian text indicating it is a classic moisturizing aftershave lotion. The cap is a muted grayish-blue color, contrasting with the white body of the bottle. The back of the bottle displays additional product information and volume (100 ml) in small, gray text. The overall design is minimalist and functional, with clean lines and a sturdy appearance. The bottle is compact and portable, suitable for personal care use in urban environments.
description: A compact, white plastic bottle with a blue-gray screw-on cap and NIVEA MEN branding, designed for aftershave lotion. The design is minimalist with clear labeling and a sturdy, portable form.
description_view_0: Front view showing the plain white body and the blue-gray cap, with no visible branding or text.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying small gray product information text and the 100 ml volume marking.
description_view_2: Side view similar to the front, showing the plain white body and cap, with no visible branding.
description_view_3: Front view with the NIVEA MEN logo, blue accent, and Russian product name clearly visible.
